# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'BUILD_TYPE',
            choices: ['maven', 'gradle', 'npm', 'python', 'dotnet'],
            description: 'Select the build system type'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'BUILD_COMMAND',
            choices: ['build', 'clean build', 'package', 'install'],
            description: 'Select the build command to execute'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'TEST_FRAMEWORK',
            choices: ['default', 'junit', 'pytest', 'jest', 'xunit'],
            description: 'Select the test framework'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'RUN_TESTS',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Whether to run tests'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'RUN_LINT',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Whether to run linting/static analysis'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'DEPLOY_TARGET',
            choices: ['none', 'staging', 'production'],
            description: 'Select deployment target environment'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'DEPLOY_METHOD',
            choices: ['docker', 'kubernetes', 'ssh', 'aws-ecs', 'azure-webapp'],
            description: 'Select deployment method'
        )
        string(
            name: 'PROJECT_DIRECTORY',
            defaultValue: '.',
            description: 'Relative project subdirectory (alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, dots, slashes only)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_NAME',
            defaultValue: 'app',
            description: 'Artifact name (alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores only)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG',
            defaultValue: 'latest',
            description: 'Docker image tag (alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, dots only)'
        )
    }

    environment {
        SAFE_PROJECT_DIR = ''
        SAFE_ARTIFACT_NAME = ''
        SAFE_DOCKER_TAG = ''
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate & Sanitize Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // Sanitize PROJECT_DIRECTORY - allow only safe path characters, prevent traversal
                    def projectDir = params.PROJECT_DIRECTORY ?: '.'
                    if (projectDir.contains('..') || projectDir.contains('~') || projectDir =~ /[;&|`\$\(\)\{\}!#\*\?<>\"\'\\]/) {
                        error("Invalid PROJECT_DIRECTORY: path traversal or special characters are not allowed.")
                    }
                    if (!(projectDir ==~ /^[a-zA-Z0-9._\-\/]+$/)) {
                        error("Invalid PROJECT_DIRECTORY: only alphanumeric characters, dots, hyphens, underscores, and forward slashes are allowed.")
                    }
                    env.SAFE_PROJECT_DIR = projectDir

                    // Sanitize ARTIFACT_NAME - strict alphanumeric with hyphens/underscores
                    def artifactName = params.ARTIFACT_NAME ?: 'app'
                    if (!(artifactName ==~ /^[a-zA-Z0-9_\-]+$/)) {
                        error("Invalid ARTIFACT_NAME: only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores are allowed.")
                    }
                    env.SAFE_ARTIFACT_NAME = artifactName

                    // Sanitize DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG
                    def dockerTag = params.DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG ?: 'latest'
                    if (!(dockerTag ==~ /^[a-zA-Z0-9._\-]+$/)) {
                        error("Invalid DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG: only alphanumeric characters, dots, hyphens, and underscores are allowed.")
                    }
                    env.SAFE_DOCKER_TAG = dockerTag

                    // Validate choice parameters are within expected values (defense in depth)
                    def validBuildTypes = ['maven', 'gradle', 'npm', 'python', 'dotnet']
                    def validBuildCommands = ['build', 'clean build', 'package', 'install']
                    def validTestFrameworks = ['default', 'junit', 'pytest', 'jest', 'xunit']
                    def validDeployTargets = ['none', 'staging', 'production']
                    def validDeployMethods = ['docker', 'kubernetes', 'ssh', 'aws-ecs', 'azure-webapp']

                    if (!validBuildTypes.contains(params.BUILD_TYPE)) {
                        error("Invalid BUILD_TYPE: ${params.BUILD_TYPE}")
                    }
                    if (!validBuildCommands.contains(params.BUILD_COMMAND)) {
                        error("Invalid BUILD_COMMAND: ${params.BUILD_COMMAND}")
                    }
                    if (!validTestFrameworks.contains(params.TEST_FRAMEWORK)) {
                        error("Invalid TEST_FRAMEWORK: ${params.TEST_FRAMEWORK}")
                    }
                    if (!validDeployTargets.contains(params.DEPLOY_TARGET)) {
                        error("Invalid DEPLOY_TARGET: ${params.DEPLOY_TARGET}")
                    }
                    if (!validDeployMethods.contains(params.DEPLOY_METHOD)) {
                        error("Invalid DEPLOY_METHOD: ${params.DEPLOY_METHOD}")
                    }

                    echo "=== Validated Parameters ==="
                    echo "Build Type: ${params.BUILD_TYPE}"
                    echo "Build Command: ${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
                    echo "Test Framework: ${params.TEST_FRAMEWORK}"
                    echo "Run Tests: ${params.RUN_TESTS}"
                    echo "Run Lint: ${params.RUN_LINT}"
                    echo "Deploy Target: ${params.DEPLOY_TARGET}"
                    echo "Deploy Method: ${params.DEPLOY_METHOD}"
                    echo "Project Directory: ${env.SAFE_PROJECT_DIR}"
                    echo "Artifact Name: ${env.SAFE_ARTIFACT_NAME}"
                    echo "Docker Image Tag: ${env.SAFE_DOCKER_TAG}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Checkout') {
            steps {
                checkout scm
            }
        }

        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                dir("${env.SAFE_PROJECT_DIR}") {
                    script {
                        def buildCmd = resolveBuildCommand(params.BUILD_TYPE, params.BUILD_COMMAND)
                        echo "Executing build: ${buildCmd}"
                        sh buildCmd
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Lint / Static Analysis') {
            when {
                expression { return params.RUN_LINT }
            }
            steps {
                dir("${env.SAFE_PROJECT_DIR}") {
                    script {
                        def lintCmd = resolveLintCommand(params.BUILD_TYPE)
                        echo "Executing lint: ${lintCmd}"
                        sh lintCmd
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { return params.RUN_TESTS }
            }
            steps {
                dir("${env.SAFE_PROJECT_DIR}") {
                    script {
                        def testCmd = resolveTestCommand(params.BUILD_TYPE, params.TEST_FRAMEWORK)
                        echo "Executing tests: ${testCmd}"
                        sh testCmd
                    }
                }
            }
            post {
                always {
                    script {
                        archiveTestResults(params.BUILD_TYPE, params.TEST_FRAMEWORK)
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Package / Archive Artifacts') {
            steps {
                dir("${env.SAFE_PROJECT_DIR}") {
                    script {
                        def packageCmd = resolvePackageCommand(params.BUILD_TYPE, env.SAFE_ARTIFACT_NAME)
                        echo "Executing package: ${packageCmd}"
                        sh packageCmd
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Staging') {
            when {
                expression { return params.DEPLOY_TARGET == 'staging' || params.DEPLOY_TARGET == 'production' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def deployCmd = resolveDeployCommand(
                        params.DEPLOY_METHOD,
                        'staging',
                        env.SAFE_ARTIFACT_NAME,
                        env.SAFE_DOCKER_TAG,
                        env.SAFE_PROJECT_DIR
                    )
                    echo "Deploying to staging: ${deployCmd}"
                    sh deployCmd
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Integration Tests on Staging') {
            when {
                expression { return params.DEPLOY_TARGET == 'production' }
            }
            steps {
                dir("${env.SAFE_PROJECT_DIR}") {
                    script {
                        def integrationCmd = resolveIntegrationTestCommand(params.BUILD_TYPE)
                        echo "Running integration tests: ${integrationCmd}"
                        sh integrationCmd
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Approval for Production') {
            when {
                expression { return params.DEPLOY_TARGET == 'production' }
            }
            steps {
                timeout(time: 30, unit: 'MINUTES') {
                    input message: 'Deploy to production?', ok: 'Approve', submitter: 'admin,release-managers'
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            when {
                expression { return params.DEPLOY_TARGET == 'production' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def deployCmd = resolveDeployCommand(
                        params.DEPLOY_METHOD,
                        'production',
                        env.SAFE_ARTIFACT_NAME,
                        env.SAFE_DOCKER_TAG,
                        env.SAFE_PROJECT_DIR
                    )
                    echo "Deploying to production: ${deployCmd}"
                    sh deployCmd
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            echo "Pipeline completed successfully for ${params.BUILD_TYPE} project."
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline failed for ${params.BUILD_TYPE} project."
        }
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}

// --- Helper functions that map validated parameters to predefined commands ---

def resolveBuildCommand(String buildType, String buildCommand) {
    def commands = [
        'maven': [
            'build'      : 'mvn compile',
            'clean build': 'mvn clean compile',
            'package'    : 'mvn clean package -DskipTests',
            'install'    : 'mvn clean install -DskipTests'
        ],
        'gradle': [
            'build'      : './gradlew build -x test',
            'clean build': './gradlew clean build -x test',
            'package'    : './gradlew clean assemble',
            'install'    : './gradlew clean build -x test'
        ],
        'npm': [
            'build'      : 'npm ci && npm run build',
            'clean build': 'rm -rf node_modules dist && npm ci && npm run build',
            'package'    : 'npm ci && npm run build && npm pack',
            'install'    : 'npm ci'
        ],
        'python': [
            'build'      : 'pip install -r requirements.txt && python setup.py build',
            'clean build': 'rm -rf build dist *.egg-info && pip install -r requirements.txt && python setup.py build',
            'package'    : 'pip install -r requirements.txt && python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel',
            'install'    : 'pip install -r requirements.txt'
        ],
        'dotnet': [
            'build'      : 'dotnet build',
            'clean build': 'dotnet clean && dotnet build',
            'package'    : 'dotnet publish -c Release',
            'install'    : 'dotnet restore && dotnet build'
        ]
    ]

    def cmd = commands[buildType]?."${buildCommand}"
    if (!cmd) {
        error("No build command mapping found for buildType='${buildType}', buildCommand='${buildCommand}'")
    }
    return cmd
}

def resolveLintCommand(String buildType) {
    def commands = [
        'maven'  : 'mvn checkstyle:check',
        'gradle' : './gradlew checkstyleMain',
        'npm'    : 'npm run lint || true',
        'python' : 'pip install flake8 && flake8 . --count --show-source --statistics || true',
        'dotnet' : 'dotnet format --verify-no-changes || true'
    ]

    def cmd = commands[buildType]
    if (!cmd) {
        error("No lint command mapping found for buildType='${buildType}'")
    }
    return cmd
}

def resolveTestCommand(String buildType, String testFramework) {
    def commands = [
        'maven': [
            'default': 'mvn test',
            'junit'  : 'mvn test',
            'pytest' : 'mvn test',
            'jest'   : 'mvn test',
            'xunit'  : 'mvn test'
        ],
        'gradle': [
            'default': './gradlew test',
            'junit'  : './gradlew test',
            'pytest' : './gradlew test',
            'jest'   : './gradlew test',
            'xunit'  : './gradlew test'
        ],
        'npm': [
            'default': 'npm test',
            'junit'  : 'npm test',
            'pytest' : 'npm test',
            'jest'   : 'npx jest --ci --reporters=default --reporters=jest-junit',
            'xunit'  : 'npm test'
        ],
        'python': [
            'default': 'pip install pytest && python -m pytest',
            'junit'  : 'pip install pytest && python -m pytest --junitxml=test-results.xml',
            'pytest' : 'pip install pytest && python -m pytest --junitxml=test-results.xml -v',
            'jest'   : 'pip install pytest && python -m pytest',
            'xunit'  : 'pip install pytest && python -m pytest --junitxml=test-results.xml'
        ],
        'dotnet': [
            'default': 'dotnet test',
            'junit'  : 'dotnet test --logger "junit;LogFilePath=test-results.xml"',
            'pytest' : 'dotnet test',
            'jest'   : 'dotnet test',
            'xunit'  : 'dotnet test --logger "xunit;LogFilePath=test-results.xml"'
        ]
    ]

    def cmd = commands[buildType]?."${testFramework}"
    if (!cmd) {
        error("No test command mapping found for buildType='${buildType}', testFramework='${testFramework}'")
    }
    return cmd
}

def resolvePackageCommand(String buildType, String artifactName) {
    def commands = [
        'maven'  : 'mvn package -DskipTests',
        'gradle' : './gradlew assemble',
        'npm'    : 'npm pack',
        'python' : 'python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel',
        'dotnet' : 'dotnet publish -c Release -o ./publish'
    ]

    def cmd = commands[buildType]
    if (!cmd) {
        error("No package command mapping found for buildType='${buildType}'")
    }
    return cmd
}

def resolveDeployCommand(String deployMethod, String environment, String artifactName, String dockerTag, String projectDir) {
    // Use Jenkins credentials for sensitive values - never pass secrets via parameters
    def envSuffix = (environment == 'production') ? 'prod' : 'staging'

    def commands = [
        'docker'     : "docker build -t ${artifactName}:${dockerTag} -f ${projectDir}/Dockerfile ${projectDir} && docker tag ${artifactName}:${dockerTag} registry.example.com/${artifactName}:${dockerTag}-${envSuffix} && docker push registry.example.com/${artifactName}:${dockerTag}-${envSuffix}",
        'kubernetes' : "kubectl set image deployment/${artifactName} ${artifactName}=registry.example.com/${artifactName}:${dockerTag}-${envSuffix} --namespace=${envSuffix} --record",
        'ssh'        : "echo 'SSH deployment to ${envSuffix} for ${artifactName} - implement with credentials binding'",
        'aws-ecs'    : "aws ecs update-service --cluster ${envSuffix}-cluster --service ${artifactName}-service --force-new-deployment --region us-east-1",
        'azure-webapp': "az webapp deployment source config-zip --resource-group ${envSuffix}-rg --name ${artifactName}-${envSuffix} --src ./publish.zip"
    ]

    def cmd = commands[deployMethod]
    if (!cmd) {
        error("No deploy command mapping found for deployMethod='${deployMethod}'")
    }
    return cmd
}

def resolveIntegrationTestCommand(String buildType) {
    def commands = [
        'maven'  : 'mvn verify -Pintegration-tests',
        'gradle' : './gradlew integrationTest',
        'npm'    : 'npm run test:integration || true',
        'python' : 'python -m pytest tests/integration/ --junitxml=integration-test-results.xml || true',
        'dotnet' : 'dotnet test --filter Category=Integration || true'
    ]

    def cmd = commands[buildType]
    if (!cmd) {
        error("No integration test command mapping found for buildType='${buildType}'")
    }
    return cmd
}

def archiveTestResults(String buildType, String testFramework) {
    try {
        switch (buildType) {
            case 'maven':
                junit allowEmptyResults: true, testResults: '**/target/surefire-reports/*.xml'
                break
            case 'gradle':
                junit allowEmptyResults: true, testResults: '**/build/test-results/**/*.xml'
                break
            case 'npm':
                if (testFramework == 'jest') {
                    junit allowEmptyResults: true, testResults: '**/junit.xml'
                }
                break
            case 'python':
                junit allowEmptyResults: true, testResults: '**/test-results.xml'
                break
            case 'dotnet':
                junit allowEmptyResults: true, testResults: '**/test-results.xml'
                break
        }
    } catch (Exception e) {
        echo "Warning: Could not archive test results: ${e.message}"
    }
}
